sql_array: CREATE TABLE rdf_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, graph_uri VARCHAR(255), data XML);
INSERT INTO rdf_data (id, graph_uri, data) VALUES (1, 'http://example.org/graph1', '<item><value>100</value></item>');
INSERT INTO rdf_data (id, graph_uri, data) VALUES (2, 'http://example.org/graph2', '<item><value>200</value></item>');
INSERT INTO rdf_data (id, graph_uri, data) VALUES (3, 'http://example.org/graph3', '<item><value>300</value></item>');
SELECT DB.DBA.SPARQL_REXEC('http://example.org/sparql', graph_uri, 'result_uri', 0) FROM rdf_data WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM rdf_data);
SELECT xpath_string('//item/value', data) AS item_value FROM rdf_data WHERE id = 1;
SELECT r.id, DB.DBA.SPARQL_REXEC('http://example.org/sparql', graph_uri, 'result_uri', 0) FROM rdf_data r LEFT JOIN rdf_data r2 ON r.id = r2.id WHERE r.data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY xpath_string('//item', data)) AS cnt FROM rdf_data WHERE data IS NOT NULL HAVING cnt > 0;
CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, data_value VARCHAR, CONSTRAINT chk_value CHECK (data_value IS NOT NULL));
INSERT INTO test_data (id, data_value) VALUES (1, 'valid_data'), (2, '123'), (3, NULL), (4, CAST('2023-01-01' AS VARCHAR));
SELECT DB.DBA.SPARQL_REXEC(?, ?, ?, ?) FROM test_data WHERE data_value != '' AND id < (SELECT id FROM test_data ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1);
SELECT DISTINCT xpath_string('//item/value', data) AS unique_values FROM rdf_data r WHERE r.graph_uri = 'http://example.org/graph1' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM rdf_data r2 WHERE r2.id = r.id);
